title: Wynn Resorts Named on Fortune Magazine's Inaugural “Modern Board 25” List
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wynn Resorts was recently recognized on Fortune Magazine's inaugural Modern Board 25 list, which highlights the top 25 most innovative boards of directors among S&P 500 companies. Wynn Resorts is the only hospitality company on the list, receiving high scores on gender equality, tenure of independent directors, board size and board independence. The Company also received accolades for its focus on cultivating and engaging a younger customer base and for its globa

title: Wynn Resorts Receives More Five-Star Awards Than Any Independent Hotel Company In The World On 2022 Forbes Travel Guide Awards
text: Encore Boston Harbor Achieves Its Inaugural Five-Star Award For Hotel And Spa LAS VEGAS, April 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Wynn Resorts (Nasdaq: WYNN) was once again honored on this year's Forbes Travel Guide (FTG) Five-Star Awards list, earning an impressive 24 Five-Star recognitions across the Company's global portfolio. This year, Encore Boston Harbor joins the Five-Star collection of resorts, receiving top marks for hotel and spa.

title: Wynn Resorts Stock Pops After Analyst Upgrade
text: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ:WYNN ) is up 2.5% at $81.76 at last check, after Citi upgraded the resort and casino operator's stock to "buy" from "neutral," noting its attractive valuation.
